item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
catalog='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json'

jq -e '. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"owner\":\"release\",\"items\":[{\"name\":\"alpha\",\"enabled\":true},{\"name\":\"beta\",\"enabled\":false}]}' \""'$catalog"
echo '"'FULL_JSON_SHAPE PASS: exact object matches current contract; no extra keys or fields'

jq -e '(.items|type)==\"array\" and (.items|length)==2 and [.items[].name]==[\"alpha\",\"beta\"] and [.items[].name|type]==[\"string\",\"string\"] and [.items[].enabled]==[true,false] and [.items[].enabled|type]==[\"boolean\",\"boolean\"]' \""'$catalog"
echo '"'RA-R04 PASS: order=alpha,beta names=string,string enabled=true,false enabled_types=boolean,boolean'"
